title: Party System
description: A lightweight NeoForge mod that adds a fully-featured party system with a customizable HUD, group chat, and friendly-fire protection. Keep track of your teammates' health and active effects!
body:
Party System – a lightweight and multifunctional party system for NeoForge (Minecraft 1.21.1). The mod lets you create parties, chat in a group channel, track teammates' health and effects via a customizable HUD, and includes friendly‑fire protection. It focuses on clean visual integration, performance, and ease of use.

### ✨ **Key Features**
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

🎯 **Party System**
Create a party and invite other players.

Accept or decline incoming invitations; block unwanted invites.

Kick members (owner only).

Automatic leadership transfer when the owner leaves.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

💬 **Group Chat**
Switch between global and party chat right on the chat screen.

Messages are prefixed with [Group] and highlighted for visibility.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

🩸 **Party HUD**
Shows heads, names, and health bars of all party members.

Displays active effect icons.

Effect icons blink smoothly when about to expire, just like the vanilla HUD.

Customizable position: drag the HUD with your mouse or move it with arrow keys.

Row height mode: choose between static (space always reserved for icons) or dynamic (rows become compact when no effects are active).
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

⚙️ **Configuration**
Configuration menu accessible via the «Configure» button in the Mods list.

The config screen offers: HUD position editor (drag‑and‑drop or arrow keys).

Toggle static/dynamic player rows.

Toggle to completely hide the Party HUD from the screen.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

🔒 **Friendly‑Fire Protection**
Party members cannot harm each other.

Tamed animals and horses of party members are also protected from allied attacks.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

🌍 **Localization**
Full English and Russian language support.

All GUI elements, messages, and HUD texts are translated.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

🚀 **Quick Start**

Open the party menu with the G key (default, can be changed in controls)

Create a party if you aren't in one

Invite players by typing their name in the field

Accept an invitation via the popup window

Open the config screen with the I key (default) or the «Configure» button in the Mods menu

Adjust the HUD position by dragging the panel or using the arrow keys
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

📌 **Notes**
Designed exclusively for NeoForge (not Forge or Fabric).

Works on servers; the server must also have the mod installed.

No extra libraries required; uses standard NeoForge APIs.
